sp_widget.css: /* No CSS here. Add via Tasker Theme */
sp_widget.description:
Create a new widget for cancel tasks modal popup, based off of widget Tasker Modal - Delete Task.
V2.7 2.7.0 | 2021-09-22 | mmcc | STRY0108861 - DIA- Cancel from Top Task Notification
sp_widget.name: Tasker Modal - Cancel Tasks
